name: Achievers Employee Recognition API
what_it_does: Achievers REST API for employee recognition and engagement platform. Enables AI agents to send recognition awards, query recognition data and leaderboards, manage point-based rewards, sync employee information, and integrate recognition into HRIS, communication, and performance management workflows. Achievers serves enterprise companies with science-backed employee recognition programs.
use_cases: Sending peer and manager recognition awards from performance milestone agents
Querying recognition frequency and engagement metrics from HR analytics agents
Syncing employee data and org structure from HRIS integration agents
Integrating recognition into collaboration tools like Slack from communication agents
not_for: Simple spot bonus management without social recognition
SMB without dedicated recognition program budget
best_when: An enterprise HR team wants AI agents to automate recognition based on performance triggers, integrate recognition data with HR analytics, and connect recognition to collaboration platforms.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Recognition data is sensitive personnel information. Point balances and reward redemption involve financial value tracking.

auth.notes: Achievers uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Scopes available for read/write per resource type. Enterprise customer API access via partner developer program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise recognition platform pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per employee; reward point budget separate from platform fee
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Toronto). Blackhawk Network owned. Enterprise-only. API access for integration partners.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Recognition frequency and point balance data reveals employee performance signals
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API via developer program
Canadian company — GDPR and PIPEDA compliance for global deployments
Blackhawk Network subsidiary — reward point redemption integrates with gift card ecosystem
Social recognition is visible within the company — automation should feel authentic
Enterprise partner program approval required for API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Recognition and reward data. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise partner program required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee recognition and reward data. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2. Enterprise partner approval required.
